title: Hall-Response / Chern-Number Notation Family
summary: Canonical notation family for the symbols k, k', \widehat{k}', and the twist-angle Berry data appearing across the Lecture Two Hall-response theorem family.
assumptions: Several nearby units reuse the same symbols with slightly different local emphasis.
regime: Shared notation for the Hall-response theorem family.
scope: Notation family for the Lecture Two response and Berry-curvature branch.
representation: Notation-family object for the Lecture Two flagship theorem family.
retrieval_hints: Use when an answer mixes k, k', and \widehat{k}' and needs a stable notation entry point.
